name: courses_list
description: List all courses in the Coursera catalog with optional pagination and field selection.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Index of the first result to return for pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response (e.g. name,slug,description,photoUrl,partnerIds).

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of linked resources to include (e.g. instructorIds,partnerIds).

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Query type for filtering. Use 'search' for keyword search.

elements.name: Machine Learning
elements.description: This course provides a broad introduction to machine learning...
